title: Device Home Screen - Device Onboarding Screens
scenario: Onboarding flow with welcome popup, swipeable screens, fit test, and final screen is displayed when pairing a supported Poly Voyager Free 60+/60/20 device for the first time
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Ensure no Poly device is currently paired.
Put a supported device (e.g., Poly Voyager Free 60+) into pairing mode (press and hold Bluetooth button).
Pair the device via Android Bluetooth settings or the app prompt.
Observe the app screen after pairing completes.
On the welcome popup, tap "Next" or swipe left to advance through swipeable screens.
On each swipeable screen, verify "Next" and "Skip" buttons are present.
Continue until reaching the Fit Test screen.
Run the fit test: insert both earbuds and confirm fit.
If fit test passes, tap "Done" or continue.
If fit test fails, tap "Retry" and repeat the fit test.
After fit test, observe the "Having Trouble?" screen with "Done" and "User Guide" buttons.
Verify the app returns to the Home screen showing the connected device.
Disconnect or forget the first device.
Pair a second supported device (e.g., Poly Voyager Free 20).
Observe that onboarding screens are triggered again for the second device.
expected: Onboarding screens (welcome popup, swipeable screens with Next/Skip, fit test screen, Having Trouble? screen with Done/User Guide) are displayed for each supported device when paired for the first time. After completing onboarding, the user returns to the device Home screen. Pairing a second supported device also triggers its own onboarding flow.
